candidate_lesson: ICT entries with bars_since_signal > 100 are stale-context trades — the signal layers were valid hours ago but execution arrives after institutional positioning has reset, neutralizing the sweep/displacement edge.
testable_rule: if entry_context['bars_since_signal'] > 50: veto_or_size_x0.0  # require fresh signal; only execute when displacement/FVG context is current
reason: Rule filters only 0 trades — insufficient sample
